name: Fallow Field

spell.name: Fallow Field
spell.critical_success: The creature regains the full number of Hit Points that would be restored by the healing effect and is temporarily immune for 1 minute.
spell.success: The creature regains the full number of Hit Points that would be restored.
spell.failure: The creature regains only half the number of Hit Points that would be restored.
spell.critical_failure: The creature doesn’t regain Hit Points from the healing effect.

text: A sickly yellow light fills the area as entropic forces prevent healing. When a creature within the area would regain Hit Points, such as from a healing effect or an ability like fast healing or regeneration, it must attempt a Will save.
